title: ruizterania retusa
side_effects: Ruizterania retusa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, excessive consumption of Ruizterania retusa extracts can lead to nausea, dizziness, and even liver damage. Additionally, prolonged use of the plant's essential oils may cause headaches, fatigue, and weakened immune systems. It's essential to consult medical professionals and follow recommended dosages to avoid these adverse effects.
